howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From request to live website in a few simple steps.

steps.title: Choose your plan
steps.description: Select the package that best fits your business and request information.

steps.title: Tell us about your business
steps.description: We contact you to understand your needs, industry and key features.

steps.title: Design and dashboard
steps.description: We build your website and configure the panel with the tools you need.

steps.title: Launch and support
steps.description: We publish your site, train you and support you during the support period.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Three clear tiers. No surprises. One-time payment for the website.

essential.name: Essential
essential.description: Ideal for freelancers and small businesses needing online presence and basic control.
features: 3 dashboard modules: contacts, stats and calendar

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: For businesses that want to manage clients, content and operations from their website.
features: Website with up to 5 custom pages
Dashboard with basic CRM (clients and tasks)
Full admin panel to edit content

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Complete solution with bookings, automations and integrations for growing businesses.
features: Custom website with up to 10-15 pages

items.question: What's included in the dashboard?
items.answer: The website admin panel is the interface through which you maintain your site's content, settings, domain and security. We build a customised interface tailored to your business needs, where you manage clients, appointments, orders, statistics and more according to your plan. Accessible from any device.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: 7-10 days for Essential, 12-15 days for Professional and 3-4 weeks for Premium, once we receive your content.

items.question: Can I upgrade later?
items.answer: Yes. You can start with Essential and add modules or upgrade to a higher plan when needed.

items.question: Is domain and hosting included?
items.answer: Yes, the first year of hosting and SSL certificate are included in all plans. We help you with the domain. From the second year onwards, hosting costs approximately €12–17/month and domain renewal around €10–15/year (depending on extension, e.g. .com or .fi). You can stay with us or move the site to your own hosting — everything remains yours.

items.question: How does the 30% savings work?
items.answer: We centralize in one panel tasks that normally require multiple tools (Excel, WhatsApp, email, calendars), reducing management time.

footer.tagline: Websites with dashboard for businesses that want to grow.
